sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application 143 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 27 2. For orders on CMA No.201/2021 3. For hearing of main case 07.10.2025 Mr. Shahid Ali Qureshi, advocate for the applicant Learned counsel is confronted as to whether the matter is squarely covered against the department by virtue of Supreme Court judgment in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue Lahore vs. Millat Tractors Limited, Lahore and others reported as 2024 SCMR 700. Learned counsel is further queried as to whether in view of binding edict supra the questions framed for determination ought to be answered against the department and consequently the reference application be dismissed in limine. He responds in the positive. Order accordingly. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Amjad
